decision-tree.root-question: Is this a Go service with an HTTP layer (or any boundary that maps errors to status codes)?

branch.question: Is Go version >= 1.13 (supports %w wrapping and errors.Is/As)?
Can the team install one ErrorMapper middleware and run golangci-lint?

example.trace: Gin service, Go 1.22, ErrorMapper accepted, golangci-lint configured -> run-the-checklist
